hero.tag: AI ENGINEER, SYSTEMS BUILDER, DATA PROBLEM SOLVER.
hero.headline: I Build ML Systems That Solve Real Problems, At Scale
hero.description: I build scalable machine learning systems and backend infrastructure that solve real-world problems through clean architecture and data-driven thinking.
hero.note: Open to ML engineering roles | Available for high-impact projects

projects.title: VeriSight V1 - Image Authenticity Verification
projects.problem: No reliable method to verify image authenticity in high-volume applications.
projects.solution: Built a multi-layer AI system using FastAPI with async orchestration, integrating CNN, ViT, GAN, and OCR models with parallel execution and meta-model fusion.

projects.title: Preventive Movement Intelligence - Posture Analytics
projects.problem: Athletes and fitness enthusiasts lack real-time injury risk assessment during exercise.
projects.solution: Developed real-time posture analysis system using Android ML Kit and FastAPI with MoveNet-based pose inference for landmark extraction and risk scoring.

projects.title: EduShield - Phishing Email Detection System
projects.problem: Educational institutions face rising phishing attacks targeting user credentials and data.
projects.solution: Built an AI-powered Flask application using TF-IDF and ML models (Logistic Regression, SVM) for real-time email classification with explainable outputs.

projects.title: Scalable ML Pipeline Backend - Production Infrastructure
projects.problem: ML models need robust backend infrastructure for production deployment and scaling.
projects.solution: Designed and deployed scalable FastAPI infrastructure with async processing, caching, CI/CD pipelines, and Docker containerization for ML model serving.

skills_footer: I don't just learn. I build, ship, optimize, and deploy.

journey.detail: Achieved 9.3 CGPA. Exploring ML frameworks, algorithms & system architecture.

journey.text: Built first production ML system (VeriSight V1) for image verification.
journey.detail: Integrated multiple AI models with async orchestration & parallel execution.

journey.text: Developed phishing detection & posture analysis systems.
journey.detail: Gained hands-on experience with FastAPI, Flask, ML models & cloud deployment.

journey_footer: Continuously learning. Continuously shipping at scale.
